title: Privacy
description: Privacy schema from Asset Graph API

anonymous.description: Whether the host uses any kind of privacy service.

proxy.description: Whether the host is an open web proxy.

relay.description: Whether the host is a location-preserving anonymous relay service, like iCloud Private Relay..

service_provider.description: The name of the privacy service providers detected.

tor.description: Whether the host is a Tor exit node.

tor_info.description: Information about the Tor exit node, if the host is one.

vpn.description: Whether the host is a VPN service exit node IP address.
